TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Huang_Pens_Le-aw, title = Huang_Pens_Le-aw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Huang_Pens_Le-aw} }

S.FORM: ci Huang Pens Le-aw (kamu nu Hulam: зТЬвАІжЬЛжЦѓвАІйЫЈе•І, Juan Ponce de Le√≥n) i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1513) a mihcaan nu aydaay a Florida (Fou-luo-li-ta-cuo дљЫзЊЕйЗМйБФеЈЮ) makatukuh, cacay a milbut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan siwa (1539) a mihcaan, ci Henadu.sutuo (иµЂеНЧе§ЪвАІзіҐжЙШ, Hernando de Soto) sayaway makatukuh i Florida (Fuo-luo-li-ta дљЫзЊЕйЗМйБФ), micumud aca tayda i Misisi-pi a sauwac mitahaw, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu sepat a bataan (1540) a mihcaan, ci Falansise.Keluonatu (ж≥ХиШ≠и•њжЦѓзІСвАІзІСзЊЕзіНеЇ¶ Francisco V√°zquezde Coronado) namaka cacay a malebtu lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1522) a mihcaa mahiya madebung nu Si-pan-ya ku Mexico (Muo-si-ke еҐ®и•њеУ•) pasaydan i amis muculil. mangalay mikilim tu nakamuwan nu babalaki a Sipuo-laci tukay (и•њдЉѓжЛЙдЄГеЯОеЄВ , amica kunikacaay ka tepa', naculilan mamin ku Yalisan-na a cascasan atu "Tay-pinyun a enal" .
S.PHON: ¶i ƒІua≈Л p…Щns r~…Њ…Щ-aw (kamu nu ƒІur~…Њam: *******, *uan pon ¶…Щ d…Щ r~…Њ…Щ*n) i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…Њ…Щbut r~…Њima a r~…Њasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…Њu (****) a miƒІ ¶aan nu ajdaaj a fr~…Њorida (fou-r~…Њuo-r~…Њi-ta- ¶uo *****) makatukuƒІ, ¶a ¶aj a mir~…Њbut r~…Њima a r~…Њasubu tur~…Њu a bataan siwa (****) a miƒІ ¶aan, ¶i ƒІ…Щnadu.sutuo (******, ƒІ…Щrnando d…Щ soto) sajawaj makatukuƒІ i fr~…Њorida (fuo-r~…Њuo-r~…Њi-ta ****), mi ¶umud a ¶a tajda i misisi-pi a sauwa ¶ mitaƒІaw, ¶a ¶aj a mar~…Њ…Щbut r~…Њima a r~…Њasubu s…Щpat a bataan (****) a miƒІ ¶aan, ¶i far~…Њansis…Щ.k…Щr~…Њuonatu (********** fran ¶is ¶o **z*u…Щzd…Щ ¶oronado) namaka ¶a ¶aj a mar~…Њ…Щbtu r~…Њima a r~…Њasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa (****) a miƒІ ¶aa maƒІija mad…Щbu≈Л nu si-pan-ja ku m…Щ*i ¶o (muo-si-k…Щ ***) pasajdan i amis mu ¶ur~…Њir~…Њ. ma≈Лar~…Њaj mikir~…Њim tu nakamuwan nu babar~…Њaki a sipuo-r~…Њa ¶i tukaj (****** , ami ¶a kunika ¶aaj ka t…Щpa Ф~ °, na ¶ur~…Њir~…Њan mamin ku jar~…Њisan-na a ¶as ¶asan atu "taj-pinjun a …Щnar~…Њ" .
S.FORM: ci Huang Pens Le-aw (kamu nu Hulam: зТЬвАІжЬЛжЦѓвАІйЫЈе•І, Juan Ponce de Le√≥n) i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1513) a mihcaan nu aydaay a Florida (Fou-luo-li-ta-cuo дљЫзЊЕйЗМйБФеЈЮ) makatukuh, cacay a milbut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan siwa (1539) a mihcaan, ci Henadu.sutuo (иµЂеНЧе§ЪвАІзіҐжЙШ, Hernando de Soto) sayaway makatukuh i Florida (Fuo-luo-li-ta дљЫзЊЕйЗМйБФ), micumud aca tayda i Misisi-pi a sauwac mitahaw, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu sepat a bataan (1540) a mihcaan, ci Falansise.Keluonatu (ж≥ХиШ≠и•њжЦѓзІСвАІзІСзЊЕзіНеЇ¶ Francisco V√°zquezde Coronado) namaka cacay a malebtu lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1522) a mihcaa mahiya madebung nu Si-pan-ya ku Mexico (Muo-si-ke еҐ®и•њеУ•) pasaydan i amis muculil. mangalay mikilim tu nakamuwan nu babalaki a Sipuo-laci tukay (и•њдЉѓжЛЙдЄГеЯОеЄВ , amica kunikacaay ka tepa', naculilan mamin ku Yalisan-na a cascasan atu "Tay-pinyun a enal" .
